title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator - Free Estimate
description: Free pregnancy due date calculator. Estimate your baby's due date based on last menstrual period or conception date. Track your pregnancy timeline.
keywords: pregnancy due date calculator, due date calculator, pregnancy calculator, baby due date, expected delivery date
intro: Estimate your baby's due date based on your last menstrual period (LMP) or conception date. A typical pregnancy lasts 40 weeks from LMP.

faq.q: How is the due date calculated?
faq.a: The due date is calculated by adding 280 days (40 weeks) to the first day of your last menstrual period (Naegele's rule).

faq.q: How accurate is the due date?
faq.a: Only about 5% of babies are born on their exact due date. Most are born within 1-2 weeks before or after.

faq.q: Can I calculate from conception date?
faq.a: Yes. If you know your conception date, the due date is approximately 266 days (38 weeks) from conception.
